institute.name: Goonjan Kala Kendra
institute.welcomeMessage: Welcome to the latest updates, announcements, and class schedule.

announcements.title: Guru Purnima 2026
announcements.description: Guru Vandana at 9:30 AM sharp, students' Baithak performances from 10:00 AM onwards, and a musical evening by Pandit M. V. Hegde from 6:00 PM onwards. Students and families are invited to celebrate with the Goonjan Kalakendra family and are requested to be present throughout the day.

events.title: Community Music Session
events.description: Join the weekly session with raaga-based practice and discussion.

events.title: Guru Purnima 2026
events.description: Guru Vandana at 9:30 AM sharp, students' Baithak performances from 10:00 AM onwards, and a musical evening by Pandit M. V. Hegde from 6:00 PM onwards. Students and families are invited to celebrate with the Goonjan Kalakendra family and are requested to be present throughout the day.

practice.title: Practice Focus
items: Warm up with alankaras for 15 minutes
Practice one raga with swara patterns
